推荐场景: 社区活动前台｜听懂任务背景故事
60秒任务: 「听故事」：B1城市任务综合；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: B1综合听力｜主旨+细节｜原因+结果｜行动项｜简单推断
场景族: 街道｜地铁站｜公交站｜出租车｜机场/车站
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
The story is mainly about ___.（抓主旨）
It happened near ___.（定位地点）
The first problem was ___.（识别开端）
Then the person decided to ___.（识别行动）
Because of ___, they had to change the plan.（因果）
The important detail is ___.（抓细节）
I think the speaker felt ___.（简单推断情绪）
The next thing they did was ___.（顺序）
The ending shows that ___.（理解结果）
Can you repeat the part about ___?（请求复述）
I missed why they went to ___.（听漏原因）
So the main event was ___.（复述主事件）
The result was different from what they expected.（转折结果）
That detail helps explain the ending.（细节作用）
Now I can retell the story.（完成任务）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: story, main event, problem, speaker, detail, ending, plan
Verbs: happen, decide, change, explain, retell, expect
Adjectives / Adverbs: main, important, different, unexpected
Time / Place: first, then, near the station, at the end
Chunks: mainly about, important detail, change the plan, retell the story, explain the ending
